page_content:
Professional Writing Requirement

Elective Courses

Total Credits

Elective Courses Students are required to take four technical electives (12 credits). The courses must be selected from an approved list of engineering and biology courses; the list will be updated regularly by the program director. At least two of the elective courses must be from the category of engineering, mathematics, or programming, while at most two of the electives can be from the category of biology courses. The program will offer electives; at the same time, the program will arrange for opportunities for electives outside the program, including USG programs offered by other universities.
